findings: Commander defines partial status for incomplete swarm launches (circuit breaker, timeout, cost ceiling)
Commander tracks failure telemetry via swarm-state.json fields
Teardown scoped to session-specific PIDs only, avoiding cross-session cascade
Agents run in isolated tmux panes with remain-on-exit=on for debugging
Metaswarm caps at 5 commanders max, providing runaway spawn safeguard
Commander launch failures logged to swarm-state.json and child-agents.jsonl
Worker Depth Lock prevents leaf nodes from spawning sub-agents
No active watchdog or auto-restart for stuck agents
Preflight check validates agent access before fleet launch
